postcard-001.webp: Do you want to protect SNAP?
postcard-002.webp: No one should ever be starving. Stop hunger in the world. We have the resources.
postcard-003.webp: PROTECT TRANS KIDS - FROM HUNGER OUR TRANS YOUTH ARE - FACING ATTACKS ON THEIR RIGHTS & THEIR LIVES - WE MUST PROTECT THEM OUR LGBTQ ELDERS HAVE - BEEN THROUGH ENOUGH END HUNGER
postcard-004.webp: I'm writing because the proposed USDA budget cuts of $230 billion over ten years will have catastrophic consequences for people who are hungry and the farmers who feed our nation. This is important to me because no one deserves to go hungry. SNAP must be protected. Anything less is unacceptable.
postcard-005.webp: SNAP must be protected! Anything less is unacceptable!
postcard-006.webp: SNAP is needed more than ever! Food costs keep increasing! Families are desperate and are facing food insecurity + hunger. PROTECT SNAP!!! FOOD IS A BASIC HUMAN RIGHT! America is the greatest of nations & should be feeding its neediest of citizens!
postcard-008.webp: Protect our children (and seniors) from hunger. Hungry Kids can't learn which leaves them permanently behind. SNAP is over 50 years old + effective. This is not the time to cut it. Save SNAP!
postcard-009.webp: Taking Farm fresh local food away from School kids is just wrong!
postcard-010.webp: SNAP is good for local economies. each $1 in SNAP benefits equates to $1.79 in economic activity.
postcard-011.webp: SNAP lifted 4.6 million people out of poverty in 2015. We need to sustain & expand it, now - more than ever!
postcard-013.webp: No one in america should have to go hungry.
postcard-014.webp: Cuts to S.N.A.P HURT: children seniors grocery stores farmers the disabled our friends. our famalies. our neighbors. our communitites. DON'T CUT SNAP
postcard-015.webp: We are facing an unacceptable hunger crisis in the United States. Right now, over 47 million people are struggling to feed themselves and their families. SNAP must be protected!
postcard-017.webp: We need to help our fellow Americans - There are so many who work FULL-TIME JOBS for LOW WAGES What they earn is not enough to survive - We need to help them! SNAP is vital to help lift people out of poverty They work hard, but wages are too low to provide basic needs SNAP is vital!
postcard-018.webp: Many of our fellow americans don't know where their next meal is coming from. That is unacceptable. support S.N.AP.
postcard-019.webp: be an american not an american't support our fellow americans & save the S.N.A.P. program!
postcard-020.webp: FOOD SHOULD NOT BE A PRIVLAGE TAKE ACTION SAVE S.N.A.P.
postcard-022.webp: Iowa's Hunger Problem Is WORSENING Nearly 11% of Iowans & Over 15% of Iowa's Children Face Food Insecurity. SAVE S.N.A.P!!
postcard-023.webp: WE THE PEOPLE FOR THE PEOPLE protect programs LIKE SNAP!
postcard-024.webp: We could all enjoy more "Honey, Honey" if you only would protect SNAP!
postcard-025.webp: SNAP must be protected. The proposed cuts of $230 billion over ten years will have catastrophic consequences for people who are hungry and the farmers who feed OUR nation. NO ONE deserves to go hungry.
postcard-026.webp: Protect Snap benefits No one should go hungry!
postcard-027.webp: Real food needs for real people. They aren't just Statistics!! Don't cut SNAP!
postcard-028.webp: STOP HUNGER! Don't stop SNAP benefits!
postcard-029.webp: Read the Bible! For Guidance! Feed the Hungry Take care of the Poor! We are the richest country in the world. No SNAP cuts
postcard-012.webp: Supporting the SNAP Program supports:  farmers  the elderly Veterans  children  single parents and other struggling Americans
